threats.title: SAP-Related npm Packages Compromised in Credential-Stealing Supply Chain Attack
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers are sounding the alarm about a new supply chain attack campaign targeting SAP-related npm Packages with credential-stealing malware. threats.title: New Wave of DPRK Attacks Uses AI-Inserted npm Malware, Fake Firms, and RATs
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered malicious code in an npm package after a malicious package as a dependency to the project by Anthropic's Claude Opus large language model (LLM). threats.title: Critical cPanel Authentication Vulnerability Identified — Update Your Server Immediately
threats.summary: cPanel has released security updates to address a security issue impacting various authentication paths that could allow an attacker to obtain access to the control panel software. The problem affects all currently supported versions, according to an alert released by cPanel on Tuesday. The issue has been addressed in the following versions - 11.110.0.97 11.118.0.63 11.126.0.54 11.132.0.29
